steps.title: Focus on Morales's method
steps.content: The question asks how Morales documents the Great Migration. The relevant note says she narrates the personal journeys of George Swanson Starling, Robert Pershing Foster, and others.

steps.title: Reject background-only details
steps.content: A gives background about Detroit, C describes awards, and D mentions only one featured journey. The best choice explains that Morales documents the broader history through individual personal journeys, naming both Starling and Foster as examples of that documentary method. The answer is B.
